response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified two main scenes: the introduction (00:00-03:29) and the performance of 'Around The World' (03:29-05:00). 2. Confirmed the song title 'Around The World' and the artists Maynard/Blaise (MONKEY MAJIK) from on-screen text. 3. Used web search to find the full lyrics for 'Around The World' by MONKEY MAJIK. 4. Constructed the JSON object, ensuring all lyrics were properly escaped for JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video features Jufuutei Raden in an art studio, followed by a musical performance of the song 'Around The World' by MONKEY MAJIK on a 3D stage.

scenes.description: Jufuutei Raden talks about artwork in a virtual art studio. No vocal music is playing.
Jufuutei Raden performs 'Around The World' on a 3D stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Every night I look to the skies and wonder what we did
Always a naive point of view that breaks us in the end
If I could find the meaning of it all I "d take the chance
Maybe in time we "ll walk the mile and change it if we can
It "s now and always (how did we get this far)
Always (we "re making a brand new start)
Always (nothing will hold me down)
Always (wave goodbye to me!)
Around the world atarashii kotoni
Around the world fumi dasu chikara de
Around the world sekai wa kawaru sa
But don"t run away "cause if it "s not ok!
I "ll change that world into something better honey!

Hate shinaku hirogaru kono michi wo
Bokura wa mata aruki tsuzukeru sa
Subete no imi ga wakaru no nara ba
Kono hitomi de nani wo mitsumeru no darou
It "s now and always (how did we get this far)
Always (we "re making a brand new start)
Always (nothing will hold me down)
Always (wave goodbye to me!)
Around the world kimi dake no tame ni
Around the world sagashi tsuzukeru yo
Around the world kiseki no kakera wo
But don"t run away "cause if it "s not ok!

And you know it "s gonna be raining
And you know it "s gonna be hard
As long as we trust each other
Nothing gonna break apart oh no! no!
If ya wanna be somebody
Get up on ya feet and go
I know we "re gonna meet each other
Somewhere around the globe
Around the world itsu demo jibun ni
Around the world make te iru hito wa
Around the world nani mo tsukame nai
But don"t run away "cause if it "s not ok!
But don"t run away "cause if it "s not ok!
I "ll change that world into something better honey!
